introduction.title: About Rotaract Club MEC
introduction.vision: To be a catalyst for positive change in society through service, leadership, and fellowship.
introduction.mission: To develop emerging leaders through service projects and community engagement.
introduction.purpose: We exist to provide young professionals and students with opportunities to serve their communities, develop leadership skills, and build lasting friendships through collaborative action.
introduction.history: Rotaract Club of Model Engineering College was established in 2015 with a mission to serve the college and surrounding communities. Since our inception, we have grown to become one of the most active clubs on campus, known for our impactful projects and dedicated members.

values.title: Service
values.description: We are committed to serving others and making a positive impact in our communities.

values.title: Leadership
values.description: We develop emerging leaders who inspire and motivate others to take action.

values.title: Fellowship
values.description: We build strong relationships and foster a sense of community among our members.

values.title: Integrity
values.description: We uphold the highest ethical standards in all our actions and decisions.

membership.title: Join Our Community
membership.introduction: Rotaract Club MEC welcomes passionate individuals who want to make a difference. Whether you're a student or young professional, there's a place for you in our community.

benefits.title: Develop Leadership Skills
benefits.description: Learn and grow through hands-on experience in leading community projects and initiatives.

benefits.title: Build Meaningful Connections
benefits.description: Network with like-minded individuals passionate about service and making a positive impact.

benefits.title: Make a Real Difference
benefits.description: Contribute to meaningful projects that directly impact your community and society.

benefits.title: Professional Growth
benefits.description: Gain valuable experience and skills that enhance your professional portfolio and career prospects.

benefits.title: Access to Opportunities
benefits.description: Participate in workshops, training sessions, and networking events exclusively for members.

benefits.title: Global Connection
benefits.description: Connect with Rotaract clubs worldwide and be part of a global movement for positive change.

eligibility: Commitment to attend club meetings and events

process.title: Express Interest
process.description: Fill out the membership form or contact us to express your interest in joining.

process.title: Interview
process.description: Meet with the membership committee to discuss your goals and aspirations.

process.title: Induction
process.description: Participate in our induction program to understand club culture and values.

process.title: Welcome!
process.description: Officially become a member and start your journey with Rotaract Club MEC.
